name: Document Management Portal
subtitle: Mane Kancor QA Department
description: Developed a web-based document management platform to streamline organizational workflows and ensure secure document storage/retrieval.
bullets: Developed a web-based document management platform to streamline organizational workflows.
Implemented modules including Document Management, Supplier Quality Management, Audit Management, Change Management, and Training Management.
Centralized document repository to ensure secure access, version control, and reduced redundancy.
Implemented user authentication and role-based access control to enforce data confidentiality.
Optimized database queries for improved performance and high-volume data handling.
Enhanced training management functionality to track employee enrollments and progress.
Collaborated with stakeholders to gather requirements, prioritize features, and deliver business-aligned solutions.

name: Extended Warranty Selling Platform
subtitle: PDigital, Dcare, Gulfown, CM Mobiles
description: Developed a full-featured platform to manage and sell extended warranty plans for electronic products across multiple retail partners.
bullets: Developed a full-featured platform to manage and sell extended warranty plans for electronic products.
Designed a secure backend architecture using Python and Django with efficient MySQL integration.
Built RESTful APIs to enable seamless integration with mobile applications.
Implemented Docker containers to standardize development environments and manage dependencies efficiently.
Ensured data integrity, application security, and scalability across platforms.
